prompt: Cartoon, 9:16 ratio of a written test in math.
Written math test with 1+1=2 and an A+ on it.

A colorful cartoon-style elementary school classroom during a test. A mischievous school bully (around 10–12 years old) is standing next to another student's desk, grinning while tearing one page of the student's test paper in half. The other student looks surprised and upset but is unharmed. Several classmates watch with shocked or concerned expressions, and the teacher is turning around after noticing the commotion. Bright, cheerful classroom with desks, books, pencils, backpacks, and educational posters. Exaggerated facial expressions, clean outlines, vibrant colors, friendly 2D cartoon illustration, expressive characters, kid-friendly, no graphic violence."
